title: mentha wagneriana
intro: Mentha wagneriana, also known as Wagner's mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Mentha wagneriana include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. The herbal preparations of Mentha wagneriana include tea, essential oil, and infusions, which can be used to make topical creams, salves, and perfumes.
